name: Kevlar Express Transit LLC
recent_news: No M&A or growth news identified. BBB-listed minority-owned small NEMT operator serving Chicago, IN, MI, WI markets.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator; pure NEMT/wheelchair-van micro-business. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Ridewithricky-Medical Trnsprtn
recent_news: No M&A news. Founded by a former MedTrans operator; single-passenger NEMT model in greater LA.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT micro-operator with no school-bus footprint. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Transport Care Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: DBE-certified in 30 states for paratransit/student transport contracts
recent_news: Rebranded from Transport Care Services to TCS Mobility (forward-looking growth positioning); founder Christopher Land has 40+ yrs industry experience suggesting eventual succession.
fit_notes: Most credible Summit-adjacent target in this batch: explicitly lists student transportation, DBE/MBE certified in 30 states, founder-led with 40+ years experience (succession potential). Small scale (~30 employees, ~$1M rev) but could be a beachhead tuck-in for SC/Southeast student-transport contracts.

name: Premier Care Transports LLC
recent_news: No M&A or growth news. Listed website in source data (ca-restaurantsupply.com) is incorrect/unrelated; actual site appears to be premiercaretransports.com.
fit_notes: Despite 'special needs' tag in source data, company is a medical/courier delivery operator (specimens, TWIC airport pickups), NOT a passenger or school-bus operator. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Need-A-Lift
districts_or_customers: dialysis, hospital discharge, doctor visits, senior outings
recent_news: No M&A news. Established 2004 family-style operator; founder/president Bryan Durr still active.
fit_notes: Senior/NEMT wheelchair-van operator with no school district or SPED contract footprint visible. Not a fit for Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis.
